Quote contains 'mp: 237-39°C' (paper's condensed range), but value_raw is '237-239 C' — the literal numeric '237-239' does NOT appear in the quote (or in the paper text). Evidence quote contains literal ellipsis '...' joining non-adjacent spans: '(7): ...; mp 130-132 °C;'. The paper text reads continuous descriptive content (yield, solid, Rf, ...) between '(7):' and 'mp 130-132'; the rule forbids '...' joining non-adjacent spans. Value 130-132 IS in the paper, but the quote form violates the verbatim/no-ellipsis rule.
